name: rpoB_consensus_Proteobacteria
description: Conserved single-copy gene rpoB consensus for Proteobacteria. RNA polymerase beta subunit; long protein-coding marker (~3500 bp), used as 16S-orthogonal phylotype marker (Case 2007). Used in PhyEco / CheckM-style genome-completeness panels and as 16S-orthogonal phylogenetic marker. Allow moderate-to-high mismatch within the group.
